concept: What most pet owners forget to track

source.screenshotMethod: Real Android emulator screenshots captured from com.caretail.app

brand.style: black graphite editorial with warm gold accents, softened for premium pet care

slides.title: What most pet owners forget to track
slides.subtitle: Pet care is more than food and walks.

slides.title: Medications and reminders
slides.subtitle: Dates, times, and repeated care tasks are easy to miss.
slides.visual: Real Add Reminder screen showing medication, vet visit, grooming, repeat, date/time, and notes fields.

slides.title: Vet visits and follow-ups
slides.subtitle: Notes matter when you need to remember what changed.
slides.visual: Real Luna profile screen showing upcoming reminders, recent health diary, documents, and export report access.

slides.title: Symptoms and behavior changes
slides.subtitle: Small details make more sense when they stay in one place.
slides.visual: Real Health Diary screen showing symptoms, mood, appetite, and energy tracking.

slides.title: Grooming and routines
slides.subtitle: Repeated tasks need a simple system.
slides.visual: Real Reminders list and Add Reminder screen showing routine-related reminder types.

slides.title: Keep care history together
slides.subtitle: One pet profile. Clearer care records.
slides.visual: Real Luna profile screen with reminders, diary, documents, and report access in one place.

slides.title: Meet CareTail
slides.subtitle: A calmer way to organize pet care.
slides.visual: Two real CareTail screenshots: home and health diary.
